title: Cold Rolling Line Efficient production of Reinforcing steel in Bars and Coils
content:
Cold Rolling Line Efficient production of Reinforcing steel in Bars and Coils
 Cold rolled ribbed rebar machines are specialized manufacturing systems used to produce high-strength reinforcing steel bars from hot-rolled wire rods or billets. The process involves cold rolling the steel at room temperature, below its recrystallization point, which significantly enhances the material’s mechanical properties, including strength, hardness, and surface quality. During this process, the cold rolling mill forms precise ribs or deformations on the surface of the rebar, improving its bonding performance with concrete and ensuring better structural integrity in construction applications.

The wire machinery can be configured as standalone equipment or complete production lines for manufacturing ribbed reinforcing steel in both coil and bar forms. The finished steel rebar is widely used in applications such as welded wire mesh, lattice girders, reinforced columns, and fabricated rebar. It plays a critical role in prefabricated structures, building foundations, and various civil engineering projects, offering efficiency, consistency, and high-quality output for modern construction needs.

 Finished Rebar Diameters Ø5–Ø12 mm

 Speed up to 10 m/s

Steel Bar – Concrete Reinforcing Bar

Flexible system designed to produce different types of steel reinforcing bars. By simply changing cold rolling cassettes, various rib patterns and profiles can be achieved, meeting diverse standards and application needs in the construction industry.

---

title: Cold Rolling Line for Straight Rebars
content:
Cold Rolling Line for Straight Rebars

Efficiently transforms wire rod into straight, ribbed reinforcing bars

Watch Videos
 ![Cold Rolling Line for Straight Rebars](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img03-b.webp)
 This cold rolling steel wire line is a versatile rebar production line designed to transform hot-rolled wire rods into high strength straight rebar. By integrating the cold rolling line and the steel rebar straightening and cutting machines into a single, seamless process, this straight rebar production equipment offers an efficient solution for reinforcing wire rolling and processing. The cold rolling process forms the ribs on the rebar surface, while the straightening section helps keep the finished rebar straight and uniform.

The wire processing machine is engineered to handle an inlet wire rod range of Ø5.5mm to Ø14mm, producing finished ribbed rebar from Ø5mm to Ø12mm at an impressive maximum production speed of 5m/s. The finished cold rolled ribbed steel bar is produced in fixed lengths ranging from 1.5m to 12m and is essential for the construction industry. It is commonly used in critical structural elements that require superior bonding strength with concrete, such as columns, foundations, beams, bridge supports, and other structural components.

 Input Wire Rod Diameter Ø5.5–Ø14mm

 Finished Rebar Diameter Ø5–Ø12mm

 Straight Rebar Length 1.5–12m

 Max. Production Speed 5m/s

 Total Power 300kW

 Tooling and Finish Rebar Pictures

![Cold rolling cassettes made from tungsten carbide](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img05s.webp) Cold rolling cassettes made from tungsten carbide
 ![Three-sided ribbed rebar](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img06s.webp) Three-sided ribbed rebar

 ![Tungsten carbide cold rolling cassettes](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img07s.webp) Tungsten carbide cold rolling cassettes
 ![Two-sided ribbed rebar](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img08s.webp) Two-sided ribbed rebar

 Process Flow

Pay-off / wire feeding → rust removal → lubrication → Rolling & rib forming → straightening & cutting → finished rebar collection

Main Components

 ![Loading Station and Pay-Off Stand](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img09_m.webp)

 Loading Station and Pay-Off Stand

Two loading stations are provided for alternating use. Each loading station can be hydraulically driven to rotate 90°, which allows easier coil handling and loading. The loading stations work together with the pay-off stand to support continuous wire feeding.

 ![Descaling Unit](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img10_m.webp)

 Descaling Unit

The descaling unit uses five rollers to bend the rebar as it passes through, which helps remove rust and surface scale. Roller positions can be adjusted by motor to accommodate different processing requirements.

 ![Rolling Mills (2 units)](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img11_m.webp)

 Rolling Mills (2 units)

Includes two rolling mills, each fitted with a cassette containing six rollers. The first rolling mill handles diameter reduction, while the second is used for ribbing. Both rolling mills work together with two drive capstans to ensure smooth and coordinated processing.

 ![Tension Regulator](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img13_m.webp)

 Tension Regulator

The tension regulator is used to balance tension between the rolling mills and the straightening machine, helping keep the processing flow more stable.

 ![Straightening and Flying Shear Cutting Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img14_m.webp)

 Straightening and Flying Shear Cutting Machine

This unit combines multi-roll straightening with flying shear cutting to straighten ribbed rebar after ribbing and cut it to the required length. The multi-roll straightening process helps protect the bar surface, keeping the rib pattern clear and reducing scratches.

 ![Collection Table](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img15_m.webp)

 Collection Table

The collection table features automatic flipping and neat rolling of finished rebar. It allows grouping of small batches, opens and closes pneumatically, and has a load capacity of 3 tons. The standard length is 12 meters, with customization options available.

Customer Project Cases

 ![Indonesia, 2025](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img16_m.webp)

 Indonesia, 2025

Reinforcing bar line delivered for construction steel production

 ![China, 2024](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img17_m.webp)

 China, 2024

Welding mesh production equipment installed in our client’s site

 ![Turkey, 2024](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1_img18_m.webp)

Cold-rolled rebar processing line working in reinforcing steel manufacturing

title: Cold Rolling Line for Coiled Rebars
content:
Cold Rolling Line for Coiled Rebars

Combines cold rolling and spool take-up to produce ribbed rebar in coil form

Watch Videos
 ![Cold Rolling Line for Coiled Rebars](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-coiling-1-2_img01-b.webp)
 This cold rolling line is specialized rebar production line engineered to efficiently produce ribbed steel bar in coils. By utilizing a rebar rolling line, this steel reinforcing bar production line processes hot-rolled wire rods with an inlet range of Ø5.5mm to Ø14mm into coiled reinforcing bar through a continuous, automated sequence of reduction and ribbing, achieving a maximum production speed of 10m/s.

This reinforcing wire rolling process is particularly important for projects where flexibility, ease of transportation and rapid execution are priorities. Unlike straight rebars, the finished steel rebar made by this rebar processing machine ranges from Ø5mm to Ø12mm, which is wound into compact coils, making it ideal feedstock for efficient downstream operations. It is typically used in the manufacturing of welded meshwork, reinforcement grids, stirrups, and various reinforcing steel parts in construction applications.

 Input Wire Rod Diameter Ø5.5–Ø14mm

 Finished Rebar Diameter Ø5–Ø12mm

 Take-Up Type Spool take-up

 Max. Production Speed 10m/s

 Total Power 275kW

 Tooling and Finish Rebar Pictures

![Tungsten carbide cold rolling cassettes](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-coiling-1-2_img07s.webp) Tungsten carbide cold rolling cassettes
 ![Tungsten carbide cold rolling cassettes](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-coiling-1-2_img08s.webp) Tungsten carbide cold rolling cassettes
 ![Three-sided ribbed rebar](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-coiling-1-2_img09s.webp) Three-sided ribbed rebar
 ![Three-sided ribbed rebar](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-coiling-1-2_img10s.webp) Three-sided ribbed rebar

 Process Flow

Wire payoff → descaling → lubrication → cold rolling & rib forming → coiling (take-off)

Main Components

 ![Loading Station and Pay-Off Stand](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-coiling-1-2_img11_m.webp)

 Loading Station and Pay-Off Stand

Two loading stations are provided for alternating use. Each station can be hydraulically turned 90° for easier coil loading and handling and works together with the pay-off stand.

 ![Descaling Unit](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-coiling-1-2_img12_m.webp)

 Descaling Unit

Five rollers bend the material as it passes through, helping remove rust and surface scale. Roller positions can be adjusted by motor.

 ![Rolling cassettes (2 units)](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-coiling-1-2_img13_m.webp)

 Rolling cassettes (2 units)

Each rolling cassette is fitted with six rollers. The first cassette is used for diameter reduction, while the second handles ribbing. Both work together with two drive capstans during processing.

 ![Residual Stress Relieving Unit](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-coiling-1-2_img14_m.webp)

 Residual Stress Relieving Unit

Used to reduce the internal stress generated in the rebar during processing.

 ![Spooler](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-coiling-1-2_img15_m.webp)

 Spooler

A 2-ton spooler is used for finished rebar take-up.

Reinforcing bar line delivered for construction steel production

title: Cold Rolling Line for Straight & Coiled Rebars
content:
Cold Rolling Line for Straight & Coiled Rebars

Processes hot-rolled wire rod into straightened or coiled cold-rolled ribbed rebar

Watch Videos
 ![Cold Rolling Line for Straight & Coiled Rebars](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img03-b.webp)

 Our rebar straightening and cutting line is a highly reliable rebar production line designed for the production of cold-rolled ribbed steel. This cold rolling line handles an inlet wire rod range of Ø5.5mm to Ø14mm, offering a flexible solution for reinforcing wire rolling, capable of delivering both precision-cut straight rebar and high-density coiled reinforcing bar in finished diameters from Ø5mm to Ø12mm, depending on your specific production requirements.

This cold rolling line simplifies the rebar manufacturing process by integrating steel wire rolling, ribbing, straightening and cutting into a single streamlined flow. The rebar cutting machine provides exceptional flexibility, producing straight bars in lengths ranging from 0.6m to 12m. Operating at a maximum production speed of 2m/s, this reinforcing bar making machine ensures consistent quality and dimensional accuracy.

Whether you need to produce fixed-length straight rebar or coiled rebar, this reinforcing bar making machine is the ideal choice to meet the diverse demands of the global steel reinforcement market.

 Input Wire Rod Diameter Ø5.5–Ø14 mm

 Finished Rebar Diameter Ø5–Ø12 mm

 Straight Rebar Length 0.6–12 m

 Max. Production Speed 2 m/s

 Total Power 92 kW

 Tooling and Finish Rebar Pictures

![Tungsten carbide rolling dies](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img06s.webp) Tungsten carbide rolling dies
 ![Tungsten carbide rolling dies](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img07s.webp) Tungsten carbide rolling dies
 ![Tungsten carbide rolling dies](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img08s.webp) Tungsten carbide rolling dies
 ![Three-sided ribbed rebar](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img09s.webp) Three-sided ribbed rebar
 ![Three-sided ribbed rebar](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img10s.webp) Three-sided ribbed rebar

 Process Flow

Payoff → Descaling → Lubrication → Rolling & rib forming → Straightening & cutting → Finished rebar collection

Main Components

 ![Loading Table and Payoff Rack](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img11_m.webp)

 Loading Table and Payoff Rack

Two loading tables are arranged for alternating use. Hydraulic flipping allows 90° turnover, and the loading tables work together with the payoff rack during material feeding.

 ![Descaling Unit](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img12_m.webp)

 Descaling Unit

As rebar passes through five rollers in the descaling unit, repeated bending helps remove rust and other surface impurities before the next processing stage.

 ![Rolling Mill](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img13_m.webp)

 Rolling Mill

Equipped with a drawing die position, the rolling mill is fitted with six rollers for diameter reduction and rib forming. Power is transmitted through the capstan to drive the rolling process.

 ![Straightening and Flying Shear Unit](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img14_m.webp)

 Straightening and Flying Shear Unit

After rib forming, rebar enters a multi-roller straightener and flying shear for straightening and cut-to-length processing. This arrangement helps maintain clear rib patterns while minimizing surface scratches. Straightness accuracy is ≤ 2 mm/m, and cut length accuracy is ± 3 mm.

 ![Standard Collection Table](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img15_m.webp)

 Standard Collection Table

Length: 12 m (customizable)

 ![Optional: Intelligent Collection Table](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/rebar-straightening-and-cutting-line-1-3_img16_m.webp)

 Optional: Intelligent Collection Table

The intelligent collection table supports automatic turnover, alignment, small-batch grouping, and pneumatic opening and closing.

Customer Case Studies

title: Wire Mesh Welding Machine
content:
Wire Mesh Welding Machine

![Wire Mesh Welding Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/wire-mesh-welding-machine-2_img01-b.webp)
 The welded mesh machine is an automated mesh welding machine engineered for the continuous production of industrial and construction wire mesh. Built to function as a reliable mesh welding line within modern mesh welding plants, this welded mesh machine integrates an intelligent rolling system that synchronizes with welding speeds of 40 to 80 strokes per minute, ensuring uniform roll consistency.

Our wire mesh welding machines are capable of processing wire diameters from 2.0 mm up to 5.0 mm across various materials, and accommodating extensive project requirements with a mesh width range of 1200 mm to 2500 mm and adjustable mesh hole sizes from 50 mm to 300 mm.

Welded Wire Mesh

![Welded Wire Mesh](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/wire-mesh-welding-machine-2_img04m.webp)
 ![Welded Wire Mesh](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/wire-mesh-welding-machine-2_img05m.webp)
 ![Welded Wire Mesh](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/wire-mesh-welding-machine-2_img06m.webp)

 Parameters

| Model | BY-1200-J | BY-2000-J | BY-2500-J |
|---|---|---|---|
| Mesh width | Max. 1200 mm | Max. 2000 mm | Max. 2500 mm |
| Mesh hole size | 50-300 mm | 50-300 mm | 50-300 mm |
| Wire diameter | 2.0-4.0 mm | 3.0-5.0 mm | 3.0-5.0 mm |
| Welding speed | 40-80 Times/min | 40-80 Times/min | 40-80 Times/min |
| Transformer | 125kVA*3 | 125kVA*5 | 125kVA*6 |
| Control | PLC touch screen | PLC touch screen | PLC touch screen |

Features

- The entire welded mesh machine is controlled by Integrated HMI (Human-Machine Interface) and PLC control, ensuring a high degree of automation

- Capable of welding galvanized wire, cold-drawn wire, black wire and other materials with wide adaptability

- Support both one-time and fractional welding to adapt to various power capacities and production needs

- The separable structure allows for easy specification adjustments and simplified routine maintenance

- The transformer features forced water cooling and a flow protection device for reliable and continuous operation

- Precision-controlled welding pressure ensures consistent welding joints

title: Flux-Cored Wire Production Line
content:
Flux-Cored Wire Production Line

Used for shaping, filling, sealing, and drawing flux-cored welding wire

Watch Videos
 ![Flux-Cored Wire Production Line](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/flux-cored-wire-production-line-3_img01-b.webp)
 Our flux-cored wire production line is designed to transform steel strips and specially formulated powders into premium tubular welding wires. Engineered for the precision manufacturing of flux-cored welding wire, this integrated welding wire production line combines automated manufacturing across multiple stages.

The flux-cored wire line can handle steel strip specifications, such as 0.8×14 mm or 1.0×14 mm, with custom configurations available to meet specific client requirements. It supports a filling rate range of 10% to 60% with a remarkable filling accuracy of ±0.4%.

To meet the diverse needs of the global welding market, our flux-cored wire line incorporates production stages of wire forming, flux filling, diameter reduction, and surface cleaning. Optimized to produce finished welding wire in standard diameters of 0.8mm, 1.0mm, 1.2mm, 1.6mm, and 2.0mm, this flux-cored welding wire machine ensures uniform specifications, and stable chemical composition.

 Finished Wire Diameter Ø0.8 mm / Ø1.0 mm / Ø1.2 mm / Ø1.6 mm / Ø2.0 mm

 Parameters

- Finished Wire Diameter: Ø0.8 mm / Ø1.0 mm / Ø1.2 mm / Ø1.6 mm / Ø2.0 mm

- Steel Strip Size: 0.8 × 14 mm, 1.0 × 14 mm, or customized according to production requirements

- Filling Ratio Range: 10%–60%

- Filling Ratio Accuracy: ±0.4%

- Maximum Strip Feeding Speed of Forming Section: 120 m/min (actual speed depends on production requirements)

 Roller Configuration for Forming Section:

- Vertical rollers: 9 sets, arranged as 3 front + 6 rear, roller diameter Ø140 mm

- Horizontal rollers: 10 sets, arranged as 3 front + 7 rear, roller diameter Ø95 mm

- Maximum Take-Up Speed of Fine Drawing Section: 20 m/s (actual speed depends on production requirements)

Applications

![Applications](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/flux-cored-wire-production-line-3_img06_m.webp)
 ![Applications](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/flux-cored-wire-production-line-3_img07_m.webp)
 ![Applications](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/flux-cored-wire-production-line-3_img08_m.webp)
 Flux-cored wire production lines are suitable for manufacturing flux-cored welding wire for carbon steel, stainless steel, heat-resistant steel, low-temperature steel, and hardfacing applications. The finished products are widely used in shipbuilding, bridge engineering, pressure vessels, pipeline welding, heavy machinery, and other important industrial sectors.

Process Flow

Steel strip rewinding → Strip forming → Flux filling → Coarse wire drawing → Fine Wire drawing → Layer winding → Packaging and storage

Main Components

 ![Steel Strip Rewinding Unit](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/flux-cored-wire-production-line-3_img09_b.webp)

 Steel Strip Rewinding Unit

- Steel Strip Size: width 8–20 mm, thickness above 0.3 mm

- Coil Outer Diameter: ≤ Ø1500 mm

- Coil Inner Diameter: Ø300–Ø500 mm

- Production Speed: 500 m/min

- Total Power: 22.75 kW

 ![Steel Strip Cleaning Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/flux-cored-wire-production-line-3_img12_b.webp)

 Steel Strip Cleaning Machine
 High-pressure water cleaning is used to remove oil and other surface contaminants from the steel strip. The cleaning machine can be installed after the steel strip rewinding unit or ahead of the flux-cored wire forming section.

 ![Flux-Cored Wire Forming and Coarse Drawing Unit](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/flux-cored-wire-production-line-3_img14_b.webp)

 Flux-Cored Wire Forming and Coarse Drawing Unit

- Applicable Product: Carbon steel flux-cored welding wire

- Steel Strip Size: 1.0 × 14 mm, or customized according to customer requirements

- Max. Strip Feeding Speed of Forming Unit: 120 m/min (actual speed depends on production requirements)

- Max. Take-Up Speed: 15 m/s (actual speed depends on production requirements)

- Filling Accuracy: ±0.4

- Filling Range: 10%–60%

- Matched Spool Size: Ø800 mm, or customized according to customer requirements

- Total Power: 109.75 kW

 ![Flux-Cored Wire Fine Drawing Unit](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/flux-cored-wire-production-line-3_img17_b.webp)

 Flux-Cored Wire Fine Drawing Unit

- Applicable Product: Carbon steel flux-cored welding wire

- Max. Take-Up Speed: 20 m/s (actual speed depends on production requirements)

- Matched Spool Size: Ø800 mm, or customized according to customer requirements

- Total Power: 121 kW

Customer Case Studies

title: Prestressed Concrete Wire & Strand Machines Equipment for producing PC wire and PC strand through drawing, stranding, and heat treatment processes
content:
Prestressed Concrete Wire & Strand Machines
 Equipment for producing PC wire and PC strand through drawing, stranding, and heat treatment processes
 Prestressed concrete wire and strand production equipment is used to manufacture PC wire and PC strand for prestressed concrete applications. Different line configurations are used depending on whether the final product is PC wire or PC strand, with steel wire processed into finished products that meet the required structure and dimensional specifications.

---

title: PC Wire Production Line (Prestressed Concrete Steel Wire Machine)
content:
PC Wire Production Line (Prestressed Concrete Steel Wire Machine)

![PC Wire Production Line](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-wire-production-line-4-1_img01-b.webp)
 PC wire production lines, or simply PC wire lines, are engineered for the automated manufacturing of pre-stressed concrete wire, delivering a sophisticated solution for the modern pre-stressed concrete and structural reinforcement industries. Specifically designed to process high-carbon steel wire rods with a carbon content of 0.77%–0.97%, this PC wire line ensures the output meets the most demanding structural integrity standards.

This pre-stressed concrete steel wire production line integrates mechanical, electrical, and hydraulic systems into a seamless, automated wire processing flow. It is capable of handling an inlet diameter range of 8mm to 13mm, transforming high-carbon steel wire rods into PC wire with outlet diameters from 3mm to 10mm, providing high tensile strength and low relaxation characteristics.

Whether you are establishing a new steel wire processing facility or upgrading an existing PC wire manufacturing plant, our PC wire production line can meet your rigorous requirements of precision-controlled stabilization treatment and high-speed drawing processes.

Parameters

| Raw Material | High-carbon steel wire (Carbon Content: 0.77%–0.97%) | Input Wire Diameter | 8–13 mm |
|---|---|---|---|
| Output Wire Diameter | 3–10 mm | Finished Tensile Strength | 1570–2300 MPa |
| Spool Diameter | Ø1200 mm | Production speed | Ø3–Ø4 mm: 170–180 m/min Ø5–Ø8 mm: 150 m/min Ø9–Ø10 mm: 120 m/min |
| Product Types | Plain, indented, spiral | | |

Finished PC Wire Samples

![Finished PC Wire Sample](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-wire-production-line-4-1_img07_m.webp)
 ![Finished PC Wire Sample](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-wire-production-line-4-1_img08_m.webp)
 ![Finished PC Wire Sample](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-wire-production-line-4-1_img09_m.webp)

 Process Flow

Wire rod coil → Wire rod payoff stand → Horizontal/vertical wire drawing machine → Straightening unit for plain / Spiral/indented PC wire → Medium-frequency induction heating furnace → Water cooling trough → Tension capstan → Auxiliary capstan → Hydraulic shear → Large take-up spool

Main Components

 ![Wire Rod Payoff Stand](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-wire-production-line-4-1_img10-b.webp)

 Wire Rod Payoff Stand

- Dimensions: Ø900 mm × 7000 mm

- Compressed Air Pressure: 500–700 kPa

- The guide rod is induction hardened to support smoother wire rod movement during pay-off.

- A rotating arm unwinds the coil in reverse, and the first drawing pass pulls the wire out through the guide pulley.

 ![Wire Drawing Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-wire-production-line-4-1_img11-b.webp)

 Wire Drawing Machine

- Each drawing machine is mounted on an independent frame.

- The reducer has a cylindrical gear transmission and a hardened gear surface, which helps keep operation steady and noise below 80 dB. Larger gearboxes are fitted on the first three drawing passes, and the reducer is covered by a one-year warranty.

- Made from 42CrMo ring-forged steel, the capstan is surface hardened on the rounded corners and tapered areas, then ground for a smoother finish. The hardening depth is 2–4 mm and working surface hardness reaches HRC ≥ 60.

The capstan surface is designed to guide the wire more smoothly during winding, so the wire does not jump, cross over, or press against adjacent loops. A wire accumulation height of at least 350 mm also helps improve cooling while the wire is running on the capstan. The capstan is connected to the main shaft by key connection, and the shaft uses a tapered design. During normal operation, the tuning roller runs steadily and only moves slightly when speed is adjusted. The capstan wall is 20 mm thick, and the structure uses a detachable water jacket.

The capstan uses both internal water cooling and external ring-type air cooling. Air cooling power is 2.2 kW. Inside the capstan, the cooling water jacket uses a narrow-slot design. A labyrinth structure is used between the capstan and its seat to keep lubricant dust from entering the inner cavity, which helps avoid circulating water contamination and blockage in the return pipe.

Water enters and exits through a pressure-type hollow shaft. The inlet connection is G1, while the return system uses four inlet and four outlet lines, all fitted with 3/4 aluminum-plastic pipes. Internal water cooling is arranged in two layers with lower inlet and upper outlet flow. The lower layer is narrower, while the upper layer is wider.

Closed direct-immersion water cooling is used for the drawing dies. Flexible hoses connect all die boxes to the corresponding water supply pipes. Separate valves are provided on the operating side for die box water supply, float indicators show the flow rate, and all joints use quick connectors.

To ensure proper cooling performance, the PC wire production line requires water that meets municipal supply standards, with a pressure of 0.2–0.35 MPa, an Ø80 inlet, an Ø200 return, and flow of 50 m³/h.

 Cooling Trough

The cooling trough sprays water onto the wire at an appropriate angle for more effective cooling. Water temperature inside the trough is monitored by a temperature sensor and shown on the display screen, while a variable-frequency pump adjusts water flow as needed to keep the cooling water temperature at no more than 40°C. The trough is 7 m long, and the outlet is fitted with an air wipe to dry the wire after cooling. Both manual and automatic control are available, and the cooling water is recirculated through the cooling circuit.

 Tension Wheel

 Diameter: 3200 mm

 Quantity: 1

 Surface Hardness after Induction Hardening: 56–60 HRC

 Maximum Tension: 3000 kg

 Vertical Take-Up Unit (Basket Type)

- Max. Outer Diameter: 2800 mm

- Min. Inner Diameter: 1200 mm

- Max. Load: 2500 kg

- Number of Baskets: 2

Customer Project Cases

![Customer Project Cases](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-wire-production-line-4-1_img13_m.webp)
 ![Customer Project Cases](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-wire-production-line-4-1_img14_m.webp)

title: PC Strand Production Line (Prestressed Concrete Steel Strand Machine)
content:
PC Strand Production Line (Prestressed Concrete Steel Strand Machine)

Watch Videos
 ![PC Strand Production Line](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img01-b.webp)
 Our PC strand production lines are designed for the continuous manufacturing of 1×7 pre-stressed concrete steel strand. Engineered to deliver high strength and low relaxation performance, this PC strand line integrates stranding, heat treatment, cooling, tension control, and precision take-up into a sophisticated tandem layout.

This PC strand manufacturing line is capable of producing the primary reinforcement products, with a strand diameter range from 9.35mm to 21.6mm. By ensuring highly stable stabilization treatment, the PC wire line allows manufacturers to consistently meet the most rigorous international reference standards, such as EN 10138-3, ASTM A416, BS 5896, and JIS G3536.

The finished 1×7 steel strands are preferred choice to produce precast concrete elements, concrete poles, and other concrete structures used in construction and infrastructure projects.

 Material High-carbon steel wire, uncoated

 Structure 1×7 (6 outer wires + 1 core wire)

 Strand Diameter Range 9.35–21.6 mm

 Compacted Strand Diameter Range 12.7–21.6 mm

 Reference Standards EN 10138-3, ASTM A416, BS 5896, JIS G3536

 Finished Product Samples

![Finished Product Samples](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img06s.webp)
 ![Finished Product Samples](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img07s.webp)
 ![Finished Product Samples](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img08s.webp)
 ![Finished Product Samples](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img09s.webp)

 Process Flow

High-carbon steel wire rod → Bobbin pay-off → Stranding → Strand compaction → Straightening → First-stage tensioning → Medium-frequency induction heat treatment → Water cooling → Second-stage tensioning → Tension compensation → Take-up → Layer winding and packing → Finished PC strand

Main Components

 ![Bobbin Pay-Off Stand](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img10m.webp)

 Bobbin Pay-Off Stand

A seven-bobbin pay-off arrangement is used on this stand, together with a mechanical double-center structure and a constant-tension device to keep unwinding more stable. Double damping wheels are installed on both sides to help maintain steady pay-off tension. The centers are made from 42CrMo, with surface hardness of HRC 55–60.

 ![Stranding Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img11m.webp)

 Stranding Machine

Seven steel wires are guided through a bow system fitted with fiberglass components and hard-alloy wire guides, then twisted inside the rotating cradle to form a 1×7 structure. Arc-tooth synchronous belts are used for transmission, and the main shaft adopts a concealed design. Strand pitch can be adjusted electronically to suit different production sizes.

 ![Straightening Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img12m.webp)

 Straightening Machine

After stranding, the PC strand goes through a GCr15 compaction die to tighten the strand and keep it more compact. Five standard die sizes are included. A 7-roll straightener comes next, with three rolls on top and four below, to improve straightness.

 ![Tensioning Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img13m.webp)

 Tensioning Machine

Before heat treatment, the strand passes through a 2020 mm tension wheel for preset tensioning. The drive wheel uses seven V-grooves designed for 1×7–17.8 strand, with groove surface hardness of HRC 55–62 and a maximum tension of 220 kN.

 ![Medium-Frequency Induction Furnace](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img14m.webp)

 Medium-Frequency Induction Furnace

Heat treatment is carried out in a digital medium-frequency induction furnace, with temperature adjustable from 370 to 420°C. A softened-water recirculation system is used for internal cooling, and temperature is linked with the control system for closed-loop control. The heating process relieves stress in the strand and supports low-relaxation performance.

 ![Cooling Trough](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img15m.webp)

 Cooling Trough

The PC strand line uses a multi-point spray arrangement so the strand can be cooled more evenly as it passes through. At the outlet, compressed air blows off the remaining water on the strand, so it comes out dry and less likely to rust. A cover is also fitted on the water tank to reduce both heat loss and water vapor.

 ![Tensioning Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img16m.webp)

 Tensioning Machine

After heat treatment and cooling, the strand passes through a second tensioning machine with the same structure as the first one. This stage works with the first tensioning section to keep the final strand size and mechanical properties more consistent.

 ![Tension Compensator](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img17m.webp)

 Tension Compensator

This section keeps take-up tension steady by adjusting it through displacement-sensor feedback during winding. The guide rollers are made from 42CrMo with a hardened surface, and a wire guide is installed at the outlet.

 ![Large-Spool Take-Up](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img18m.webp)

 Large-Spool Take-Up

Finished strand is wound here onto large bobbins sized Ø2400 × 1800, with take-up capacity up to 28 tons. The take-up section is driven by a 55kW variable-frequency motor, while the wire guide is driven by a separate 1.5 kW variable-frequency motor and moves along a linear rail through a ball screw to keep the winding orderly.

 ![Layer Winding and Packaging](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img19m.webp)

 Layer Winding and Packaging

Hydraulic movement, lifting, and pushing are used here for coil unloading and packaging. The drum has an inner diameter of 760 mm and a length of 750 mm, and the coil can be unloaded in four or eight sections. The automatic wire-laying keeps the winding neat, while packaging speed exceeds 250 m/min and single-coil weight can reach 4 tons.

Customer Project Cases

![Customer Project Cases](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img20_m.webp)
 ![Customer Project Cases](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img21_m.webp)
 ![Customer Project Cases](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img22_m.webp)
 ![Customer Project Cases](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/pc-strand-production-line-4-2_img23_m.webp)

title: Wire Drawing Machines
content:
Wire Drawing Machines

 Wire drawing machines are used to reduce the diameter of steel wire by pulling the material through a series of dies. The process allows for smooth control of reduction, producing wire with precise dimensions and consistent strength and quality. The finished wire is widely used in applications such as welded mesh, fasteners, springs, welding wire, and reinforcement materials for construction and industrial manufacturing.

Hylite offers different types of wire drawing machines to suit various materials and production needs, including dry wire drawing machines for high carbon steel, straight line wire drawing machines for low carbon steel, and inverted wire drawing machines for large coil applications.

---

title: Dry Wire Drawing Machine
content:
Dry Wire Drawing Machine

![Dry Wire Drawing Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/dry-wire-drawing-machine-5-1-example.webp)

The wire drawing line is a straight line wire drawing machine for the production of various metal wires utilizing dry drawing method. Whether processing high-carbon steel wire for high-tensile applications or low-carbon steel wire for general industrial use, this wire dry drawing line is engineered for continuous, multi-pass cold drawing to achieve precise wire diameter reduction while maintaining superior surface quality.

Our straight line wire drawing machine features an arrangement of drawing capstans that allows the wire to travel in a linear path, ensuring high-speed stability. The finished dry-drawn wire serves an extensive range of applications such as springs, fasteners, fencing, steel cords, and more.

Equipped with integrated automation and precise tension control, our dry wire drawing solutions deliver reliability required for various steel grades. Please refer to the capacity and parameters for high and low carbon steel wire drawing lines below.

Dry Wire Drawing Machine (High Carbon Steel Wire)

Watch Videos
 ![Dry Wire Drawing Machine (High Carbon Steel Wire)](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/dry-wire-drawing-machine-5-1_img01b.webp)

- Processing Range: Maximum inlet: Ø6mm; Minimum outlet: Ø1.5mm

- Mechanical Performance: 1 Inlet strength ≤1200MPa; Average reduction ≤20.82%;Total reduction ≤90.53%

- Drawing Drum: Diameter Ø560–600mm

- Braking Time: Normal ≤30s; Fast≤10s; Emergency ≤5s

- Maximum inlet: Ø6mm; Minimum outlet: Ø1.5mm

- Production Capacity: Finished diameter 2.0mm; Up to 800kg/h (70# high carbon steel)

- Drawing Speed: Max. line speed: 720m/min

Straight Line Wire Drawing Machine (Low Carbon Steel)

 Drawing Drum: Diameter Ø560–600mm

 Drawing Speed: Infinitely variable speed via frequency converter

 Braking Time: Normal ≤30s, Fast ≤10s, Emergency ≤5s

Main Components

Features

title: Inverted Wire Drawing Machine
content:
Inverted Wire Drawing Machine

Watch Videos
 ![Inverted Wire Drawing Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/inverted-wire-drawing-machine-5-2_img01-b.webp)

 The inverted wire drawing machine (IVD) is a high-capacity wire drawing machine specifically engineered for processing large-diameter, heavy-duty metal wires. As an essential component in metal wire production lines, this vertical wire drawing machine is designed to handle raw materials with diameters up to Ø40 mm, performing precise cold drawing to achieve significant diameter reduction while ensuring superior metallurgical quality.

Equipped with a hydraulic automatic threading system, our inverted vertical drawing machine significantly reduces manual labor and ensures a stable, continuous wire drawing process. The wire is drawn through the die box under controlled tension and is then vertically wound onto an overhead inverted take-up drum, This vertical configuration allows for the formation of large-weight finished coils that are ready for immediate industrial use or downstream processing.

Parameters

Process and Performance Parameters

| Category | Parameter | Specification / Description |
|---|---|---|
| Processing Capacity | Applicable Materials | High, medium, and low carbon steel, spring steel, alloy steel, copper, stainless steel, tool steel, etc. |
| Max. Inlet Diameter | Ø40 mm | |
| Max. Finished Coil Weight | 2500 kg | |
| Drawing Performance | Drum Diameter | 1400 mm |
| Drawing Speed | 0–28 m/min (adjustable) | |
| Main Motor Power | 110 kW (6-pole) | |
| Auxiliary Functions | Take-up Conveyer Travel Distance | 2300 mm |
| Take-up Conveyer Rotation Motor Power | 4 kW | |
| Take-up Conveyer Travel Motor Power | 1.5 kW | |

Mechanical Structure Parameters

| Category | Parameter | Specification / Description |
|---|---|---|
| Dimensions | Main Machine Dimensions (L×W×H) | approx. 4650mm×4950mm×3400mm (including rails) |
| Core Components | Drum | Ø1400×600mm, surface coated with tungsten carbide, hardness HRC 63. |
| Die Box | Composed of powder box and die box sections; the die box is water-cooled and can be adjusted vertically for alignment. | |
| Straightening Unit | Five-roll straightener installed before the die box to ensure straight wire entry. | |
| Pressure Rollers | 6 imported wear-resistant and high-temperature resistant nylon rollers. | |
| Take-up Conveyer | Coil diameter Ø2200 mm; driven by 4 kW motor with frequency inverter. | |
| Reducers | Gear reducers (WPDS-80, WPDO-120). | |

Electrical and Control System

| Drive system | AC variable frequency motor with gear reducer |
|---|---|
| Control core | PLC intelligent control system |
| Speed control | AC frequency inverter (brand: INOVANCE / Huichuan) |
| Operating interface | Control panel |

Fluid Power System

| Hydraulic System | Used to drive the hydraulic automatic clamping system for automatic wire threading |
|---|---|
| Pneumatic System | Composed of cylinders, solenoid valves, and related components, used to control clamping actions such as pressure rollers |
| Air Supply Requirement | Pressure 0.6–0.8 MPa, flow rate ≥0.25 m³/min |

Utility Requirements

| Power Supply | Three-phase, 380V, 50Hz |
|---|---|
| Air Supply | Compressed air |

Production Line Process

Material loading and pay-off → Threading and wire feeding (completed automatically by hydraulic system) → Drawing and take-up → Automatic stop at full coil and coil removal → Coil unloading and cycle restart

Main Components

 ![3.0-ton Damping Pay-off Unit](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/inverted-wire-drawing-machine-5-2_img08_m.webp)

 3.0-ton Damping Pay-off Unit

Positioned at the beginning of the production line and used for holding and uncoiling large-diameter metal wire coils (up to Ø40 mm). The damping mechanism provides adjustable braking force to ensure stable and uniform pay-off tension during the drawing process, preventing wire loosening due to inertia or breakage, and supporting stable downstream drawing.

 ![Take-Up Conveyer](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/inverted-wire-drawing-machine-5-2_img10_m.webp)

 Take-Up Conveye

Not a passive component, but an integrated automated unit combining rotational winding, independent drive, and mobile unloading functions. Working together with the hydraulic automatic threading system of the main machine, it forms a complete automated process from loading, drawing, take-up to unloading, improving overall production efficiency.

 ![Wire Drawing Machine](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/inverted-wire-drawing-machine-5-2_img09_m.webp)

 Wire Drawing Machine

Serves as the core equipment in the metal wire cold processing line. The drawing machine applies strong drawing force to pull large-diameter metal wire through the die, reducing its diameter while simultaneously winding it into large-weight finished coils.

Customer Project Cases

 ![Belarus](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/inverted-wire-drawing-machine-5-2_img12_m.webp) Belarus

title: Combined Drawing Line
content:
Combined Drawing Line

![Combined Drawing Line](https://wiremachinery-en.com/products/combined-drawing-line-6_img01-b.webp)

 Our combined drawing line is an integrated system designed for the continuous processing of various metals, including steel, copper, aluminum, stainless steel, and alloys. This combined drawing system is engineered to transform raw materials into round and profiled bars through a seamless sequence of drawing, straightening, cutting and surface finishing.

Specifically built for industrial-scale manufacturing, this combined drawing machine handles inlet diameters ranging from Ø30 mm to Ø8 mm with a pulling force of 3 to 25 tons. The bar drawing line integrates multiple processing units including pay-off, prestraightener, shot blasting machine, drawing unit, profile straightener, hydraulic shear, guide rack, 2-roll straightening machine, and delivery table.

Technical Parameters (HLT-SX-20T)

| Maximum Pulling Force | 200 kN |
|---|---|
| No-Load Drawing Speed | 5–50 m/min (infinitely variable speed) |
| Processing Range | Round bar: Ø10 mm – Ø30 mm Square bar: H10 mm – H21 mm Hexagonal bar: S10 mm – S25 mm Copper: Ø45 mm Aluminum: Ø45 mm |
| Processing Length | 2m–12m (±5 mm) |
| Surface Roughness of Finished Product | Ra0.4–0.8μm |
| Straightness of Finished Product | Round bar ≤0.3mm/m |
| Dimensional Tolerance | ±0.02mm |
| Total Power | Approx. 250kW |
| Main Motor Power | 160kW |
| Power Supply | Three-phase 380V/50Hz |
| Air Pressure | 4MPa ± 1MPa |
| Total Machine Weight | Approx. 68t |

title: Company Profile
content:
Watch Videos
 ![Company Profile](https://wiremachinery-en.com/about/company-profile_img01b.webp)

 Company Profile

Located in Xianxian Economic Development Zone, Cangzhou, Hebei, Hebei Hylite Machinery Company focuses on the development, manufacturing, sales, and service of rebar and metallic wire processing equipment. Years of experience in steel processing machinery have supported the growth of a product range that includes cold-rolled ribbed rebar production lines, straightening machines, wire drawing machines, flux-cored welding wire production lines, PC strand lines, and PC steel bar equipment.

- [Cold Rolling Line](https://wiremachinery-en.com/cold-rolling-line-1.html)

- [Flux-Cored Wire Production Line](https://wiremachinery-en.com/flux-cored-wire-production-line-3.html)

- [Prestressed Concrete Wire & Strand Machines](https://wiremachinery-en.com/prestressed-concrete-wire-strand-machines-4.html)

- [Wire Drawing Machines](https://wiremachinery-en.com/wire-drawing-machines-5.html)

Our rebar and wire processing equipment is supported by a professional R&D team that includes Italian designers, while our experienced after-sales team provides technical support and service assistance. We mainly serve customers involved in rebar production, wire processing, welding wire manufacturing, prestressed steel production, and other construction and industrial applications.

We have passed ISO9001 quality management system certification and obtained CE certification for the European market. Recognized as a high-tech enterprise in Hebei Province, we currently hold 19 patents, including 4 invention patents and 12 utility model patents.

![Certification](https://wiremachinery-en.com/about/company-profile_img02s.webp)
 ![Certification](https://wiremachinery-en.com/about/company-profile_img03s.webp)
 ![Certification](https://wiremachinery-en.com/about/company-profile_img04s.webp)

 Our market presence continues to grow, and our products have been exported to more than 90 countries, including Togo, South Korea, Vietnam, Cambodia, Thailand, Malaysia, the Philippines, Indonesia, India, Pakistan, Iran, Saudi Arabia, Russia, Egypt, Senegal, Mali, Benin, Niger, Venezuela, Argentina, Algeria, Mozambique, and Mauritius.

content:
Customers

Related Equipment [Cold Rolling Line for Straight Rebars](https://wiremachinery-en.com/ribbed-rebar-cold-rolling-straightening-1-1.html)

title: Ribbed Rebar Processing Equipment | Hylite Factory Tour
content:
![Factory Tour](https://wiremachinery-en.com/about/factory-tour_img02b.webp)

 Backed by more than 20 years of experience in metal processing equipment, we focus on the development and manufacturing of wire drawing machines, cold-rolled ribbed bar equipment, PC strand equipment, and welding wire production lines, providing practical solutions for customers in steel processing and related industries.

We understand the production requirements of steel reinforcing bar and wire processing, so our equipment is developed with close attention to processing performance and product quality.

![Factory Tour](https://wiremachinery-en.com/about/factory-tour_img03b.webp)

 Our wire drawing machines handle different materials and wire specifications with high precision, while cold-rolled ribbed bar equipment delivers stable operation and uniform rib patterns for efficient reinforcing bar production.

PC strand production lines offer a high level of integration and accurate stranding performance, and welding wire production lines support automated processing with even and secure copper coating for demanding welding applications. From solution design and equipment manufacturing to installation, commissioning, and after-sales service, we provide one-stop support through our well-equipped manufacturing base.

title: Services for Ribbed Rebar & Wire Equipment
content:
As a factory that combines manufacturing and sales, we are able to offer competitive pricing along with direct technical support. We provide customers with clear product information, answer questions promptly, and help suggest practical solutions based on different production needs. We also continue to improve and update our equipment to keep up with changing market demands and customer requirements.

 ![Pre-Sales](https://wiremachinery-en.com/about/service_img01b.webp)

 Pre-Sales

We provide clear product information, respond to customer questions, and introduce the main features of our cold-rolled ribbed bar equipment, wire drawing machines, flux-cored welding wire production lines, PC wire and PC strand production lines, while recommending suitable solutions for different production needs.

 ![During Production and Delivery](https://wiremachinery-en.com/about/service_img02b.webp)

 During Production and Delivery

Our steel bar and wire processing equipment is manufactured in line with the customer’s project requirements, and each unit is tested before shipment to ensure proper operation and safe performance.

 ![After-Sales Service](https://wiremachinery-en.com/about/service_img03b.webp)

 After-Sales Service

We provide full technical support and service after delivery, including free on-site installation guidance and training to help operators become familiar with machine setup and operation. We can also arrange for engineers to travel to the customer’s country for machine installation and staff training. With experience in more than 60 countries, our engineering team is familiar with different project and service requirements. A one-year warranty is provided from the date the rebar and/or wire processing machine is installed at the customer’s factory. We can also prepare documents such as CE certification, Form E, and certificates of origin to support smoother customs clearance.
